qa_pair.question: What was the total Biom Alpine Mint Wipes unit count sold across all Target stores in the week ending 2026-04-25? Use bpd_describe_schema to find the right table and column names, then run a single SQL query via bpd_run_sql.
Which Target store location had the highest single-day Biom sales in March 2026 by units? Return the location_id (or store_id) as a bare integer.

What were Biom total unit sales at Target stores in Texas in the trailing 4 weeks ending 2026-05-09? Use bpd_describe_schema first, then join sales_weekly to location_attr to filter by state == 'TX'. Return a single integer.

For the top-selling Biom TCIN (by units in the trailing 8 weeks ending 2026-05-09), what is the weighted average weeks-of-supply across all stores? Use bpd_get_top_skus then bpd_get_sell_through to compute weeks_of_supply. Round to one decimal.
How many (TCIN, location_id) pairs had a sell-through rate below 20% in the trailing 4 weeks ending 2026-05-09? Compute via bpd_get_sell_through and count. Return a bare integer.
Using bpd_get_inventory_snapshot for as_of=2026-05-12, how many Target store locations are currently out of stock (on_hand == 0) for the Biom Alpine Mint Wipes TCIN? Return a bare integer.
Which Biom TCIN had the largest week-over-week decline in unit sales between the week ending 2026-04-25 and the week ending 2026-05-02? Return the TCIN as a bare integer.
What is the average gross margin percent across all Biom SKUs for the four weeks ending 2026-05-09? Use the gross_margin table. Return as a percent with one decimal (e.g. "31.4%").
How many BPD files has the MCP successfully loaded since the warehouse was created? Use bpd_cache_status. Return a bare integer.
What is the earliest data date present in the warehouse across all loaded datasets? Use bpd_list_datasets and return the date in YYYY-MM-DD format.
